commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a9dc0f988c4ed36a9175fe6387296ec3aa11e959)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu drive list cursor inputs, an optional fetch-all mode, paginated info lookup, and mocked regression coverage in the Feishu plugin.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +213. Total +268 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main and v2026.6.8 call `drive.file.list` only once for the affected list/info paths, while the SDK returns `has_more` and `next_page_token`. I did not run a live Feishu tenant with a multi-page folder in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because contributor live proof, the `all` API-load decision, and the sibling PR lane choice cannot be settled by an automated repair alone.

target.title: fix(feishu): add pagination support for drive list and info
target.body:
## Summary

Feishu drive list/info missing pagination support

## Changes

- `extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts`: Add page_size, page_token, and all parameters
- `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`: Add pagination loop for listFolder and getFileInfo
- `extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts`: Add regression tests for list.all pagination

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu drive list and info actions lacked pagination, failing when folders contain more than 10 items (the default page size).

Real environment tested: ubuntu-24.04, Node 24, branch fix/issue-93928-feishu-drive-pagination.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.8

 ✓ 19 tests passed (19)

 Including:
 ✓ forwards list pagination cursors and returns continuation metadata
 ✓ searches subsequent drive pages for info while preserving folder scope
 ✓ list with all:true paginates through multiple pages
 ✓ list without all:true does not paginate when has_more is true
```

Observed result after fix: All 19 drive tests pass. Pagination behavior verified: `all: true` loops through pages via has_more + page_token; default (no `all`) returns single page.

What was not tested: End-to-end with a real Feishu tenant with >10 items in a folder (requires platform-specific credentials).

Closes: #93928
target.author: ajwan8998

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: ajwan8998
commands.review_summary:
Adds an in-memory DeliverySerializer around outbound platform sends, with unit tests for same-key FIFO delivery, cross-key concurrency, error propagation, synchronous throws, and cleanup.

PR surface: Source +67, Tests +101. Total +168 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the behavior class: the PR discussion includes live Telegram proof of inversion, and current source shows concurrent sends are independently queued and delivered without a same-recipient lane.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are concrete outbound-delivery repairs that do not require a new product decision.
